queries.name: All SCCM Sites and Their Infrastructure

queryList.query: MATCH (s:SCCMSite) OPTIONAL MATCH (ss)-[:SCCMSiteServerFor]->(s) OPTIONAL MATCH (mp)-[:SCCMManagementPointFor]->(s) OPTIONAL MATCH (dp)-[:SCCMDistributionPointFor]->(s) OPTIONAL MATCH (db)-[:SCCMDBServerFor]->(s) RETURN s, ss, mp, dp, db
MATCH (c)-[r:SCCMDistributionPointFor]->(s:SCCMSite) WHERE r.pxe_enabled = true RETURN c, s

queries.name: TAKEOVER-1: DB Servers Relayable via MSSQL (EPA not enforced)

queryList.query: MATCH (s:SCCMSite)-[r:SCCMRelayTarget]->(db) WHERE r.epa_enforced = false RETURN s, r, db

queries.name: TAKEOVER-2: DB Servers Relayable via SMB (signing not required)

queryList.query: MATCH (s:SCCMSite)-[r:SCCMRelayTarget]->(db) WHERE r.smb_signing_required = false RETURN s, r, db

queries.name: EXEC-1/EXEC-2: All Computers Manageable by SCCM Site (RCE path)
Shortest Path to SCCM Site Server via Sessions/AdminTo

queryList.query: MATCH (ss)-[:SCCMSiteServerFor]->(s:SCCMSite) WITH ss MATCH p=shortestPath((n)-[:MemberOf|HasSession|AdminTo*1..]->(ss)) WHERE NOT n=ss RETURN p

queries.name: Shortest Path from SCCM Site to Domain Admins

queryList.query: MATCH (ss)-[:SCCMSiteServerFor]->(s:SCCMSite) WITH ss MATCH p=shortestPath((ss)-[:MemberOf|HasSession|AdminTo|SCCMManages*1..]->(da:Group)) WHERE da.name CONTAINS 'DOMAIN ADMINS' RETURN p

queries.name: Users with Sessions on SCCM-Managed Computers

queryList.query: MATCH (s:SCCMSite)-[:SCCMManages]->(c:Computer) MATCH (u:User)-[:HasSession]->(c) RETURN u, c, s LIMIT 500
MATCH (s:SCCMSite)-[:SCCMManages]->(c:Computer) MATCH (u)-[:AdminTo]->(c) RETURN u, c, s LIMIT 500

queries.name: Computers with Specified IP (change 10.0.0 as required)

queryList.query: MATCH (c:Computer) WHERE NOT isEmpty(c.sccmIPAddresses) AND ANY(value in c.sccmIPAddresses WHERE value contains '10.0.0') RETURN c

MATCH (c:Computer) WHERE NOT isEmpty(c.sccmUnresolvableSessions) AND NOT ALL(value in c.sccmUnresolvableSessions WHERE value CONTAINS 'LOCAL' OR value CONTAINS 'NT AUTHORITY' OR value CONTAINS 'ANONYMOUS LOGON' or value CONTAINS 'LOCAL SERVICE' or value CONTAINS 'NETWORK SERVICE') RETURN c
MATCH p=shortestPath((n)-[:MemberOf|HasSession|AdminTo|SCCMManages*1..]->(m:Group)) WHERE m.name CONTAINS 'DOMAIN ADMINS' AND NOT n=m RETURN p

queries.name: Full SCCM Attack Path: User to RCE on Any Managed Computer

queryList.query: MATCH (ss)-[:SCCMSiteServerFor]->(s:SCCMSite)-[:SCCMManages]->(target:Computer) MATCH p=shortestPath((attacker:User)-[:MemberOf|HasSession|AdminTo*1..]->(ss)) WHERE NOT attacker = ss RETURN p, s, target LIMIT 50
